name: Rivian Automotive, Inc. / DE
summary: Rivian Automotive, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated electric vehicle manufacturer that designs and produces electric trucks, SUVs, and commercial delivery vans. The company develops vehicles including consumer-facing products and commercial fleet vehicles, alongside associated software and services. Rivian has a strategic relationship with Volkswagen Group and has received investment from major partners. The company operates a manufacturing facility and focuses on EV technology, software platforms, and sustainable transportation solutions.

products.name: Electric Truck (R1T)
products.description: Consumer-facing electric pickup truck produced by Rivian.

products.name: Electric SUV (R1S)
products.description: Consumer-facing electric sport utility vehicle produced by Rivian.

products.name: Electric Delivery Van (EDV)
products.description: Commercial electric delivery van designed for fleet operations.

products.name: Vehicle Software & Services
products.description: Software and services platform accompanying Rivian's electric vehicles.

partnerships.description: Strategic partnership involving expected future investments in Rivian by Volkswagen Group.
